nasb.text: You have declared today that you have done good to me, that the Lord delivered me into your hand and yet you did not kill me.

esv.text: And you have declared this day how you have dealt well with me, in that you did not kill me when the Lord put me into your hands.

cnv.text: 今天你所作的說明了你以良善待我，因為耶和華把我交在你手裡，你卻沒有殺我。

ccb.text: 你今天使我明白你善待了我，耶和华把我交在你手中，你却没有下手杀我。
